message:
feat(engine): add 22 deep integration tests for tier-up profiler and monitor scheduler

- tier_up_profiler (12 tests): policy defaults/hashing, candidate ID determinism,
  hot path sample serde, rejection/event roundtrips
- monitor_scheduler (10 tests): probe VOI scoring, staleness tracking,
  regime multiplier effects, scheduler config serde

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
